ns0:entry.ns0:title: [html] techjarves/USB-Uncensored-LLM
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/techjarves/USB-Uncensored-LLM
Language: html
The ultimate zero-install, portable local AI environment. Run high-quality, uncensored LLMs (Gemma, Qwen, NemoMix) directly from any USB drive or SSD. Fully air-gapped, cross-platform (Win/Mac/Linux), and privacy-first with persistent chat history.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: [java] vaadin/platform
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/vaadin/platform
Language: java
Vaadin platform 10+ is a Java web development platform based on Vaadin web components. If you don't know to which repository your bug report should be filed, use this and we'll move it to the right one.
